de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy.quantifierHeuristics

Class EqualityConstraint

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy.quantifierHeuristics.EqualityConstraint
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Constraint
    Deprecated.

    @Deprecated
public class EqualityConstraint
extends Object
implements Constraint
    This class implements a persistent constraint. The constraint contains pairs of Metavariables X and Terms t meaning X=t. It offers services like joining two Constraint objects, adding new constraints to this one by unfying two terms and creating all necessary Metavariable - Term pairs. There are no public constructors to build up a new Constraint use the BOTTOM constraint of the Constraint interface (static final class variable) and add the needed constraints. If a constraint would not be satisfiable (cycles, unification failed) the Constraint TOP of interface Constraint is returned.

      • isSatisfiable

        public final boolean isSatisfiable()
        Deprecated. 
        a constraint being instance of this class is satisfiable. If a method realizes that an unsatisfiable Constraint would be built because of failed unification, cycle or s.th. similar it returns the singleton TOP being instance of the subclass Top
        Specified by:
        isSatisfiable in interface Constraint
        Returns:
        true always

      • restrictedMetavariables

        public Iterator<Metavariable> restrictedMetavariables()

        Returns:
        list of metavariables, instantiations of which may restricted by this constraint

      • getDirectInstantiation

        public Term getDirectInstantiation(Metavariable p_mv)
        Deprecated. 
        Returns:
        The most general known term that is more defining than p_mv itself by which p_mv can be replaced if the constraint is valid (or null if the constraint allows arbitrary instantiations of p_mv). This is just the entry of map.

                             TermServices services)
        Deprecated. 
        Specified by:
        getInstantiation in interface Constraint
        services - TODO
        Returns:
        the term by which p_mv is instantiated by the most general substitution satisfying the constraint

      • unify

        public Constraint unify(Term t1,
                        Term t2,
                        TermServices services)
        Deprecated. 
        unifies terms t1 and t2
        Specified by:
        unify in interface Constraint
        Parameters:
        t1 - Term to be unified
        t2 - term to be unified
        services - the Services providing access to the type model (e.g. necessary when introducing intersection sorts)
        Returns:
        TOP if not possible, else a new constraint with after unification of t1 and t2

      • unify

        public Constraint unify(Term t1,
                        Term t2,
                        TermServices services,
                        BooleanContainer unchanged)
        Deprecated. 
        executes unification for terms t1 and t2.
        Specified by:
        unify in interface Constraint
        Parameters:
        t1 - Term to be unfied
        t2 - Term to be unfied
        services - the Services providing access to the type model (e.g. necessary when introducing intersection sorts)
        unchanged - true iff the new constraint equals this one
        Returns:
        TOP if not possible, else a new constraint unifying t1 and t2 ( == this iff this subsumes the unification )

      • compareBoundVariables

        private static boolean compareBoundVariables(QuantifiableVariable ownVar,
                                             QuantifiableVariable cmpVar,
                                             ImmutableList<QuantifiableVariable> ownBoundVars,
                                             ImmutableList<QuantifiableVariable> cmpBoundVars)
        Deprecated. 
        compare two quantifiable variables if they are equal modulo renaming
        Parameters:
        ownVar - first QuantifiableVariable to be compared
        cmpVar - second QuantifiableVariable to be compared
        ownBoundVars - variables bound above the current position
        cmpBoundVars - variables bound above the current position

      • indexOf

        private static int indexOf(QuantifiableVariable var,
                           ImmutableList<QuantifiableVariable> list)
        Deprecated. 
        Returns:
        the index of the first occurrence of var in list, or -1 if the variable is not an element of the list

      • unifyHelp

        private Constraint unifyHelp(Term t0,
                             Term t1,
                             ImmutableList<QuantifiableVariable> ownBoundVars,
                             ImmutableList<QuantifiableVariable> cmpBoundVars,
                             NameAbstractionTable nat,
                             boolean modifyThis,
                             TermServices services)
        Deprecated. 
        Compares two terms modulo bound renaming and return a (possibly new) constraint object that holds the instantiations necessary to make the two terms equal.
        Parameters:
        t0 - the first term
        t1 - the second term
        ownBoundVars - variables bound above the current position
        cmpBoundVars - variables bound above the current position
        modifyThis - this is an object that has just been created during this unification process
        services - the Services providing access to the type model (e.g. necessary when introducing intersection sorts). Value null is allowed, but unification fails (i.e. @link Constraint#TOP is returned), if e.g. intersection sorts are required.
        Returns:
        a constraint under which t0, t1 are equal modulo bound renaming. this is returned iff the terms are equal modulo bound renaming under this, or modifyThis==true and the terms are unifiable. For !modifyThis a new object is created, and this is never modified. Constraint.TOP is always returned for ununifiable terms

      • introduceNewMV

        private Constraint introduceNewMV(Term t0,
                                  Term t1,
                                  boolean modifyThis,
                                  TermServices services)
        Deprecated. 
        Resolve an equation X=Y (concerning two metavariables) by introducing a third variable Z whose sort is the intersection of the sorts of X,Y and adding equations X=Z,Y=Z. NB: This method must only be called if none of the sorts of t0,t1 is subsort of the other one. Otherwise the resulting equation might get commuted, Z might occur on the left side of the new equations and horrible things will happen.
        Parameters:
        t0 -
        t1 -
        services -
        Returns:
        the constraint

      • handleJava

        private static NameAbstractionTable handleJava(Term t0,
                                               Term t1,
                                               NameAbstractionTable nat)

        Deprecated. 

      • unifyHelp

        private Constraint unifyHelp(Term t1,
                             Term t2,
                             boolean modifyThis,
                             TermServices services)
        Deprecated. 
        Unify t1 and t2
        Parameters:
        modifyThis - this is an object that has just been created during this unification process
        services - the Services providing access to the type model
        Returns:
        a constraint under which t0, t1 are equal modulo bound renaming. this is returned iff the terms are equal modulo bound renaming under this, or modifyThis==true and the terms are unifiable. For !modifyThis a new object is created, and this is never modified. Constraint.TOP is always returned for ununifiable terms

      • normalize

        private Constraint normalize(Metavariable mv,
                             Term t,
                             boolean modifyThis,
                             TermServices services)
        Deprecated. 
        checks for cycles and adds additional constraints if necessary PRECONDITION: the sorts of mv and t match; if t is also a metavariable with same sort as mv, the order of mv and t is correct (using Metavariable.compareTo)
        Parameters:
        mv - Metavariable asked to be mapped to the term t
        t - the Term the metavariable should be mapped to (if there are no cycles )
        services - the Services providing access to the type model
        Returns:
        the resulting Constraint ( == this iff this subsumes the new constraint )

      • getMutableConstraint

        private EqualityConstraint getMutableConstraint(boolean modifyThis)
        Deprecated. 

      • equals

        public boolean equals(Object obj)
        Deprecated. 
        checks equality of constraints by subsuming relation (only equal if no new sorts need to be introduced for subsumption)
        Specified by:
        equals in interface Constraint
        Overrides:
        equals in class Object

      • isAsStrongAs

        public boolean isAsStrongAs(Constraint co)
        Deprecated. 
        Specified by:
        isAsStrongAs in interface Constraint
        Returns:
        true iff this constraint is as strong as "co", i.e. every instantiation satisfying "this" also satisfies "co".

      • isAsWeakAs

        public boolean isAsWeakAs(Constraint co)
        Deprecated. 
        Specified by:
        isAsWeakAs in interface Constraint
        Returns:
        true iff this constraint is as weak as "co", i.e. every instantiation satisfying "co" also satisfies "this".

      • join

        public Constraint join(Constraint co,
                       TermServices services)
        Deprecated. 
        joins the given constraint with this constraint and returns the joint new constraint.
        Specified by:
        join in interface Constraint
        Parameters:
        co - Constraint to be joined with this one
        services - the Services providing access to the type model
        Returns:
        the joined constraint

      • join

        public Constraint join(Constraint co,
                       TermServices services,
                       BooleanContainer unchanged)
        Deprecated. 
        joins constraint co with this constraint and returns the joint new constraint. The BooleanContainer is used to wrap a second return value and indicates a subsumption of co by this constraint.
        Specified by:
        join in interface Constraint
        Parameters:
        co - Constraint to be joined with this one
        services - the Services providing access to the type model
        unchanged - the BooleanContainers value set true, if this constraint is as strong as co
        Returns:
        the joined constraint

      • joinHelp

        private Constraint joinHelp(EqualityConstraint co,
                            TermServices services)
        Deprecated. 

      • hasCycle

        private boolean hasCycle(Metavariable mv,
                         Term term)
        Deprecated. 
        checks if there is a cycle if the metavariable mv and Term term would be added to this constraint e.g. X=g(Y), Y=f(X)
        Parameters:
        mv - the Metavariable
        term - The Term
        Returns:
        a boolean that is true iff. adding a mapping (mv,term) would cause a cycle

                               Term term)
        Deprecated.
